brand_identity.overall_vibe: Print-magazine inspired, journalistic, warm, and highly professional. It relies on high-contrast, classic serif typography paired with a signature mustard-gold accent and subtle dotted grid patterns to evoke a modern editor's desk.

headings.usage: Article titles, hero names, large pull quotes

visual_motifs.backgrounds: Subtle, light-grey dotted grid patterns (like a halftone print) used behind text or as section dividers, exactly like the Instagram tiles.
visual_motifs.dividers: Thin, crisp black lines (1px) used to separate columns and sections, mimicking magazine layouts.
visual_motifs.photography: Warm, natural color grading matching the profile picture. No heavy filters, keeping it authentic and professional.
visual_motifs.accent_shapes: Solid rectangular blocks behind category tags (gold and red), slightly offset from the text for a 'stamped' editorial look.
